resources.string: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
All notes, tasks, and events will be removed
Save a backup of all your data
Get started by creating something new.
This note will be moved to trash and permanently deleted after 30 days.
The request timed out. Please try again.
For questions about these terms, contact us at productivityx7@gmail.com.
A conflict occurred. Please refresh and try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
Failed to delete. Please try again.
Tell us a bit about yourself
Create tags to organise your notes.
What would you like to do?
The requested item could not be found.
A conflict was detected for \'%1$s\'. Which version would you like to keep?
ProductivityX provides a unified workspace including notes, tasks, calendar, focus timer (Pomodoro), and AI assistant features. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any feature at any time.
Your account and subscription will be cancelled
Please check the form and fix any errors.
This conversation and all its messages will be permanently deleted.
You do not have permission to perform this action.
Share your tasks, events, and notes with the AI assistant
An error occurred while generating the response.
Tap \'Forgot password\' on the login screen. A reset link will be sent to your email address.
Connect to the internet to load your content.
How do I reset my password?
This tag will be removed from all notes that use it.
Try a different search or filter.
You can change this anytime in settings.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.
Length of short breaks between sessions
A new version of ProductivityX is available. Update now for the latest features and fixes.
Create your first task to get started.
Try different keywords or check your spelling.
How does the Pomodoro timer work?
Go to Settings > Data & Sync and tap \'Export data\'. Your notes, tasks, events, and settings will be saved as an encrypted backup file.
By accessing or using ProductivityX, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
This task will be moved to trash.
Play a sound when a session ends
This context is sent to the AI with every message.
You can reach us at productivityx7@gmail.com or use the \'Send feedback\' option in Settings > Help & Support.
Failed to load. Tap to retry.
Stay on top of reminders, focus sessions, and daily summaries.
The AI assistant is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
ProductivityX is a unified workspace app that combines notes, tasks, calendar, a Pomodoro focus timer, and an AI assistant in one place.
The Pomodoro timer knows what you\'re working on and tracks your time automatically.
How do I export my data?
No tasks due today. Enjoy your day!
Get in touch with the team
We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via the app or email.
Choose the AI model for the assistant
ProductivityX and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Oussama Chatri and are protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws.
ProductivityX is not intended for users under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children. If we become aware of such data, we will delete it promptly.
Get notified when a Pomodoro session ends
Notes in trash are permanently deleted after 30 days.
This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
Yes. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. You can also enable local-only mode to keep all data on your device without cloud sync.
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.
You can change these anytime in settings.
Live timer updates and session notifications.
This note will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
Length of long breaks after a full cycle
Your assistant sees your active tasks, upcoming events, and recent notes before it responds.
You\'ll need to sign in again to access your workspace.
DND Access required. Please enable in settings.
Enter a new password for your account.
Receive a morning summary of your day
You\'re using ProductivityX without an account.\nYour data stays on this device only.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
A tag with this name already exists.
Restore data from a backup file
Searching locally. Connect to the internet for full results.
Use a denser layout to show more content
Notes, tasks, calendar, focus timer, and an AI assistant that actually understands your day.
Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
This feature requires permission. Please enable it in settings.
Your use of ProductivityX is also governed by our Privacy Policy. We take data security seriously and implement industry-standard measures to protect your information.
You can access, modify, or delete your data at any time through the app settings. You can request a full export of your data or permanently delete your account.
I can see your workspace â€” tasks, events, and notes â€” to give you context-aware answers.
The AI assistant can see your active tasks, upcoming events, and recent notes to provide context-aware answers. It uses Google Gemini models.
Select another day or add a task
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them?
End time must be after start time.
ProductivityX may use third-party services for AI assistance, push notifications, and analytics. These services are contractually bound to protect your data and use it only for the intended purposes.
Yes. You can enable offline mode in settings. Changes will sync automatically when you reconnect to the internet.
Automatically begin the next session after a break
ProductivityX needs storage access to let you choose a profile photo.
Complete more tasks to see your productivity patterns
This action requires an internet connection.
Delete this event or all events in the series?
ProductivityX is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of the app.
No tags yet. Tap + to create one.
We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Deleted items are kept in trash for 30 days before permanent deletion. Account deletion removes all associated data within 90 days.
Your password has been changed. Sign in with your new password.

We collect information you provide when creating an account, including your name, email address, and profile picture. We also collect data you create within the app such as notes, tasks, events, and focus sessions.
Pull down to refresh, or tap the button below.
Number of focus sessions before a long break
Start a focus session to see your history here.
All your data (notes, tasks, events, conversations) will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
You already have an active session. End it before starting a new one.
Can I change the app language?
ProductivityX uses the following open source libraries:
ProductivityX needs camera access to let you take a profile photo.
Save a PDF copy of this note
Keep all data on this device
Allow notifications to receive task reminders and Pomodoro alerts.
Your account has been created successfully
Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information. You can choose to keep data local-only without cloud sync.
This note will be moved to trash. You can restore it within 30 days.
Notes in \"%s\" will not be deleted.
Automatically begin breaks when a session ends
Your progress will be saved but the session will be marked as interrupted.
We may update this Privacy Policy. We will notify you of material changes through the app or via email.
You agree not to use ProductivityX for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws. You may not attempt to disrupt, damage, or gain unauthorized access to our systems.
You\'re offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
Built with â¤ï¸ using Kotlin & Jetpack Compose
Adjust the timeline or add tasks
Server error. Please try again later.
What happens when I delete my account?
Tap + to create your first task
For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at productivityx7@gmail.com.
How does the AI assistant work?
All notes in the trash will be permanently deleted.
Notes, tasks, and your calendar connected in a single workspace.
Include completed tasks in the task list
Get notified when a task reminder is due
Your data is used to provide and improve ProductivityX features, sync across devices, and send relevant notifications. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
No available slots found for this week
All your notes, tasks, events, and conversations will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be reversed.
No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
Yes. Go to your profile and tap the language setting. ProductivityX supports multiple languages including English, French, Arabic, Spanish, German, and more.
The tag \"%s\" will be removed from all notes.
Failed to save. Please try again.
Download all your notes, tasks, and events as a file.
%1$s will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
All messages in this conversation will be cleared.
Start a new conversation to get help with your workspace.
The Pomodoro timer alternates between focus sessions and breaks. You can customize durations, auto-start breaks, and link tasks to track focus time per task.
